revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Akshobhya); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:51, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:51, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Pakistan|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject China|importance=Mid}} }} ==Symbols== *[http://buddhism.kalachakranet.org/5_dhyani_buddhas.html] Akshobhya: [[Vajra]] is his family symbol and vajra is his family. :Austerlitz -- [[Special:Contributions/88.75.76.245|88.75.76.245]] ([[User talk:88.75.76.245|talk]]) 20:33, 7 October 2008 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:1|one external link|1 external links}} on [[Akshobhya]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=742936535 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090308000000/http://buddhism.kalachakranet.org/5_dhyani_buddhas.html to http://buddhism.kalachakranet.org/5_dhyani_buddhas.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 19:11, 6 October 2016 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Akshobhya]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=788047216 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20111003041954/http://www.geschkult.fu-berlin.de/e/indologie/bajaur/publication/strauch_2008_1_1.pdf to http://www.geschkult.fu-berlin.de/e/indologie/bajaur/publication/strauch_2008_1_1.pdf When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 05:08, 29 June 2017 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Akshobhya); add local discussion section + dated import note

Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=742936535 my edit]. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090308000000/http://buddhism.kalachakranet.org/5_dhyani_buddhas.html to http://buddhism.kalachakranet.org/5_dhyani_buddhas.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 19:11, 6 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:17, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Akshobhya]].
